introSection: Huracan is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter roller coaster at Belantis in Leipzig, Saxony, Germany. Opened in 2010, it is one of only two Euro-Fighter installations that use Gerstlauer's launch coaster train, with the other one being Dare Devil Dive at Six Flags Over Georgia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: For the 2019 season, some of the track was replaced.

fullText:
Huracan is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter roller coaster at Belantis in Leipzig, Saxony, Germany. Opened in 2010, it is one of only two Euro-Fighter installations that use Gerstlauer's launch coaster train, with the other one being Dare Devil Dive at Six Flags Over Georgia.

For the 2019 season, some of the track was replaced.
